<!--
PR economy per docs/working-contract.md:
- No LOC cap. Bundle related tickets when they form one cohesive unit.
- "Verified locally" is implied by green CI — don't enumerate.
- Auditor subagents (spec-guardian, weather-and-verdict-auditor,
  alert-pipeline-auditor, rls-and-tenancy-auditor) run automatically when
  relevant; no per-PR attestation checkbox.
- Single-author policy: no Co-Authored-By trailers.
- Screenshots/Playwright traces only for UI changes where the visual matters.
